omniProcessElements.description: We have a single catalog structure with all products, so these filters used to only show specific sets of offers on each step.
omniProcessElements.name: SetCatalogFilters
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "elementValueMap" : { "AddOnFilter" : "FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-SFTWR-OFR-MS-OFFICE365\" || FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-SFTWR-OFR-NORDVPN\"", "EntertainmentFilter" : "FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-OTT-OFR-03-HULU\" || FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-OTT-OFR-09-YOUTUBETV\"", "InstallFilter" : "FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-INET-OFR-PROFINST\"", "InternetFilter" : "ATTR:B2C-ATTR-INET-DOWNLOAD-SPEED <= %ServiceabilityResult%", "PremiumEntertainmentFilter" : "FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-OTT-OFR-01-DISNEY\" || FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-OTT-OFR-02-HBOMAX\" || FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-OTT-OFR-05-NETFLIX\" || FLD:ProductCode == \"B2C-OTT-OFR-07-SPOTIFY\"" }, "label" : "Set Catalog Filters", "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "wpm" : false }

omniProcessElements.description: Copies the serviceability address to the registration step.
omniProcessElements.name: SetRegistrationAddress
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "elementValueMap" : { "RegistrationCity" : "=IF(STRING(%Serviceability:Address-Block:City%) != '[object Object]', %Serviceability:Address-Block:City%, %Serviceability:Address-Block:AdminArea3%)", "RegistrationCountry" : "=%Serviceability:Address-Block:Country%", "RegistrationPostalCode" : "=%Serviceability:Address-Block:PostalCode%", "RegistrationState" : "=%Serviceability:Address-Block:State%", "RegistrationStreetAddress" : "=CONCATENATE(%Serviceability:Address-Block:StreetNumber%, ' ', %Serviceability:Address-Block:Street%)" }, "label" : "Set Registration Address", "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "wpm" : false }

omniProcessElements.description: Updates the Billing Address if a new one was provided in the Payment Step.
omniProcessElements.name: UpdateBillingAddress
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "enableActionMessage" : false, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "extraPayload" : { "AccountId" : "%AccountId%", "City" : "%BillingCity%", "ContactId" : "%ContactId%", "Country" : "%BillingCountry%", "PostalCode" : "%BillingPostalCode%", "State" : "%BillingState%", "StreetAddress" : "%BillingStreetAddress%" }, "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Demo_UpdateBillingAddress", "label" : "Update Billing Address", "message" : { }, "postMessage" : "Done", "postTransformBundle" : "", "preTransformBundle" : "", "pubsub" : false, "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "remoteOptions" : { "chainable" : false, "postTransformBundle" : "", "preTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "condition" : "=", "data" : "new", "field" : "BillingAddressType" } ] } }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "svgIcon" : "", "svgSprite" : "", "useContinuation" : false, "validationRequired" : "Step", "wpm" : false }

omniProcessElements.description: Confirms that the Order has been successfully created (or in case of Digital Commerce we have a contexKey)
omniProcessElements.name: ValidateOrder
